BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"2. I do not expect things to work out for me.","Q2":"2. As I look back, I see a lot of failures.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"2. I am disappointed in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"1. I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"3. I don't have enough energy to do anything.","Q16":"1-. I sleep somewhat less than usual.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"1-. My appetite is somewhat less than usual.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"2. I am too tired or fatigued to do a lot of the things I used to do.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
